title: Pull-to-search with magnifying spring
design_brief: Search bar grows from a magnifying icon when pulled. Reference: Arc Search mobile pattern.
mobile_reasoning: Icon scale + search width interpolated from overscroll.

title: Sheet with embedded WebView
design_brief: Bottom sheet showing a web page (e.g., terms of service preview).
mobile_reasoning: WebView's gestures interact with sheet pan; manage via scroll arbitration similar to rn-002.

title: FlashList memo + stable callbacks for renderItem
design_brief: Best practice: memoize cell components + pass stable callbacks.
mobile_reasoning: useCallback at parent. memo with equality at cell.

title: Liked-by avatar pile that expands on tap
design_brief: Stacked avatar circles (3 visible + 'N more'). Tap to expand into a full list.
mobile_reasoning: Stack avatars with negative margin. Tap opens bottom sheet with full list.

title: Tickled spring physics (drag + release wobble)
design_brief: A draggable element that wobbles like jelly on release. Reference: iOS dock icons.
mobile_reasoning: Spring with low damping creates wobble.

title: Photo selection grid with limit indicator
design_brief: From rn-038 multi-select photo picker, add 'X of N selected' header.
mobile_reasoning: Header reads selection count; if at max, dim unselected cells.

title: Map with 3D buildings on iOS
design_brief: Enable 3D building rendering on Apple Maps.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps showsBuildings=true; camera with pitch.

title: Bullet chart for goal vs actual
design_brief: Horizontal bullet chart: actual vs target marker. Reference: dashboard apps.
mobile_reasoning: Skia rects + target line.

title: Greenscreen / phosphor monitor look
design_brief: Old amber CRT monitor look — orange glow text, scan lines.
mobile_reasoning: Mono font + amber color + textShadow.
solution: // phosphor.ts\nimport {StyleSheet} from 'react-native';\nexport const phStyles = StyleSheet.create({screen:{flex:1, backgroundColor:'#1A0F00', padding:20}, text:{fontFamily:'JetBrainsMono-Regular', color:'#FFAD3A', fontSize:14, textShadowColor:'#FFAD3A', textShadowRadius:4, lineHeight:20}});
interaction_details: Amber glow text on dark background

title: List virtualization for chat rooms (very long scrollback)
design_brief: Chat with 10000+ messages. Use FlashList inverted with date-grouped loading.
mobile_reasoning: FlashList inverted + incremental fetch as user scrolls back.

title: Field that exposes 'show password' toggle
design_brief: Password field with eye icon to toggle visibility.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Eye that looks like a button (not affordance)
mobile_reasoning: secureTextEntry toggle; ensure native suggestion strip still works.

title: Pop to specific screen in stack
design_brief: From a deep stack, return to a specific ancestor (e.g., 'Done' from edit screen returns to list).
mobile_reasoning: router.dismissTo(path) or navigation.popToTop().
solution: // Pattern\nimport {router} from 'expo-router';\nexport function popToList() { router.dismissAll(); router.replace('/(tabs)/list'); }

title: Send-message rocket animation
design_brief: Send button: on tap, message bubble rocket-flies into the conversation. Reference: iMessage send animation.
mobile_reasoning: Insert message + animate translateY from input position to its final row.

title: Mesh gradient blob badge
design_brief: Achievement badge with mesh gradient fill.
mobile_reasoning: Skia LinearGradient with multiple stops + circular shape.

title: Audio meter level indicator
design_brief: Real-time audio input level meter (recording or call). Reference: voice apps.
mobile_reasoning: expo-av Recording metering callback; smooth via low-pass filter.

title: Reverse geocoding pin drop
design_brief: Drop a pin on map; show resulting address via reverse geocoding.
mobile_reasoning: expo-location reverseGeocodeAsync on coordinate change.

title: Compact week view (7 mini bars)
design_brief: Tiny 7-day bar chart for fitness widget. Reference: Apple Health weekly trend.
mobile_reasoning: 7 Views with height percentage.

title: Nature: organic shapes, earth tones, natural textures
design_brief: Calm earth-tone aesthetic with organic shapes. Reference: meditation apps.
mobile_reasoning: Earth palette + blob shapes from rn-209.

title: Image dimensions known upfront avoid layout passes
design_brief: For images in lists, knowing dimensions ahead avoids layout reflow.
mobile_reasoning: Server returns image dimensions in API; use them at render to pre-allocate space.

title: Slide-to-confirm slider (e.g., unlock to send)
design_brief: Slide-to-unlock-style confirmation. Reference: 'Slide to power off' iOS.
mobile_reasoning: Pan from left to right; past threshold, fire.

title: Sheet that overlays multiple times (stacking with backdrop dim)
design_brief: Each additional sheet darkens backdrop further. From rn-032.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Same backdrop dim regardless of depth
mobile_reasoning: Backdrop opacity = baseDim + 0.1 * depth.

title: FlashList with horizontal swipe revealing actions
design_brief: Combine FlashList with SwipeRow from rn-015 efficiently.
mobile_reasoning: Wrap each row in memo + estimatedItemSize accurate.

title: Address book picker (contacts)
design_brief: Allow user to pick a contact from their address book.
mobile_reasoning: expo-contacts requestPermissionsAsync then getContactsAsync.

title: Modal with multiple stop steps and back history
design_brief: Multi-step modal that maintains step history (back through steps without closing modal).
mobile_reasoning: Use Expo Router nested stack inside modal screen.
solution: // app/modal/_layout.tsx\nimport {Stack} from 'expo-router';\nexport default function ModalLayout() { return (<Stack><Stack.Screen name='step1'/><Stack.Screen name='step2'/><Stack.Screen name='step3'/></Stack>); }
interaction_details: Steps stack like a regular nav

title: Pulse on new notification badge
design_brief: Badge dot pulses when a new notification arrives.
mobile_reasoning: Pulse triggered by count increment (useEffect on count).

title: Animated wave loader (water filling shape)
design_brief: Loading state where water fills a logo shape.
mobile_reasoning: Skia path of logo + clipped wave from rn-125.

title: Document scanner with edge detection (iOS native)
design_brief: VisionKit document scanner for receipts/business cards.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-document-scanner or use expo-document-scanner (community).

title: Map dark/light auto-switch on tunnel/inside
design_brief: Switch to dark when ambient light low (e.g., entering tunnel via GPS).
mobile_reasoning: Listen to ambient light sensor (Android) or assume from time of day (iOS).

title: Annotated event line on time-series
design_brief: Time-series chart with vertical lines marking events (e.g., 'launched feature X').
mobile_reasoning: Skia line at event x + label.

title: Vapor wave: pink/purple gradient, retrofuturist
design_brief: Pink/purple/cyan vapor wave aesthetic. Reference: indie music apps.
mobile_reasoning: Multi-color linear gradient + chrome text.
